allow: Bash(node -e "const lr = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(lr\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('twitter'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('github'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('x'\)\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('.env.local','utf8'\); d.split\('\\n'\).forEach\(l => { const [k,v] = l.split\('='\); if\(k&&v\) process.env[k.trim\(\)]=v.trim\(\); }\); require\('./node_modules/ts-node/dist/bin.js'\)" -- scripts/seed.ts)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\) if 'convex' in k or 'mongoose' in k]")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); const all={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; console.log\('convex:', all.convex||'NOT INSTALLED'\); console.log\('mongoose:', all.mongoose||'not installed'\)")
